name: python3-uvicorn
title: python3-uvicorn
summary: ASGI server implementation, using uvloop and httptools (Python3 version)
description:
ASGI server implementation, using uvloop and httptools (Python3 version)
Uvicorn is a fast ASGI server, built on uvloop and httptools. It currently
supports HTTP/1.1 and WebSockets.
.
Uvicorn is designed with particular attention to connection and resource
management, in order to provide a robust server implementation. It aims to
ensure graceful behavior to either server or client errors, and resilience to
poor client behavior or denial of service attacks.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-uvicorn because ASGI server implementation, using uvloop and httptools (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-uvicorn as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-uvicorn with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-uvicorn --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
